channel.title: Drupal.org — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Drupal.org (drupal).

item.title: CVE-2026-6816 · 5.1 MEDIUM — TFA Basic Plugins - Access Bypass
item.description: An access bypass vulnerability in Drupal TFA Basic Plugins allows users with the administer users permission to view or generate recovery codes for other users. This issue affects TFA Basic Plugins: from 7.x-1.0 through 7.x-1.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-5343 · 7.4 HIGH 🌩️ — SAML SSO - Service Provider - Critical - Authentication bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-031
item.description: Improper Check for Unusual or Exceptional Conditions vulnerability in Drupal SAML SSO - Service Provider allows Privilege Escalation. This issue affects SAML SSO - Service Provider: from 0.0.0 before 3.1.4.

item.title: CVE-2026-4093 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Stored XSS in Drupal 7 Term Reference Tree module (token display templates and term labels)
item.description: In the Drupal 7 Term Reference Tree module, two stored XSS vectors exist in the widget/formatter rendering pipeline. Vector A (token display templates): When the Token module is enabled and token display templates are configured, attacker-controlled…

item.title: CVE-2026-4929 · 5.1 MEDIUM — Simple Hierarchical Select (Drupal 7) XSS in term-derived output
item.description: Simple Hierarchical Select (SHS) for Drupal 7 contains cross-site scripting risk due to improper output escaping of term-derived text. Confirmed affected paths include field formatter output (shs_field_formatter_view) and term-tree child-term data ge…

item.title: CVE-2026-9082 · 9.8 CRITICAL 💥 🌩️ — Drupal core - Highly critical - SQL injection - SA-CORE-2026-004
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Drupal Drupal core allows SQL Injection. This issue affects Drupal core: from 8.9.0 before 10.4.10, from 10.5.0 before 10.5.10, from 10.6.0 before 1…

item.title: CVE-2026-8495 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — Date iCal - Critical - Information disclosure - SA-CONTRIB-2026-037
item.description: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Drupal Date iCal allows Forceful Browsing. This issue affects Date iCal: from 0.0.0 before 4.0.15.

item.title: CVE-2026-8493 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Colorbox Inline - Moderately critical - Cross-site scripting - SA-CONTRIB-2026-036
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal Colorbox Inline allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). This issue affects Colorbox Inline: from 0.0.0 before 2.1.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-8492 · 2.7 LOW — Translate Drupal with GTranslate - Less critical - DOM clobbering / link manipulation - SA-CONTRIB-2026-035
item.description: Modification of Assumed-Immutable Data (MAID) vulnerability in Drupal Translate Drupal with GTranslate allows Resource Location Spoofing. This issue affects Translate Drupal with GTranslate: from 0.0.0 before 3.0.5.

item.title: CVE-2026-8491 · 3.7 LOW 🌩️ — Node View Permissions - Moderately critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-034
item.description: Improper Check for Unusual or Exceptional Conditions vulnerability in Drupal Node View Permissions allows Forceful Browsing. This issue affects Node View Permissions: from 0.0.0 before 1.7.0, from 2.0.0 before 2.0.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-6871 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Obfuscate - Moderately critical - Cross-site scripting - SA-CONTRIB-2026-033
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal Obfuscate allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). This issue affects Obfuscate: from 0.0.0 before 2.0.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-6367 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Drupal core - Moderately critical - Cross-site scripting - SA-CORE-2026-003
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal Drupal core allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). This issue affects Drupal core: from 11.3.0 before 11.3.7.

item.title: CVE-2026-6366 · 6.6 MEDIUM — Drupal core - Moderately critical - Gadget Chain - SA-CORE-2026-002
item.description: Improperly Controlled Modification of Dynamically-Determined Object Attributes vulnerability in Drupal Drupal core allows Object Injection. This issue affects Drupal core: from 8.0.0 before 10.5.9, from 10.6.0 before 10.6.7, from 11.0.0 before 11.2.1…

item.title: CVE-2026-6365 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Drupal core - Critical - Cross-site scripting - SA-CORE-2026-001
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal Drupal core allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). This issue affects Drupal core: from 8.0.0 before 10.5.9, from 10.6.0 before 10.6.7, from 11.0…

item.title: CVE-2026-6095 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Orejime - Moderately critical - Cross-site scripting - SA-CONTRIB-2026-032
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal Orejime allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). This issue affects Orejime: from 0.0.0 before 2.0.16.

item.title: CVE-2026-0748 · 5.3 MEDIUM — Access bypass in Drupal 7 i18n_node translation UI
item.description: In the Drupal 7 Internationalization (i18n) module, the i18n_node submodule allows a user with both "Translate content" and "Administer content translations" permissions to view and attach unpublished nodes via the translation UI and its autocomplete…

item.title: CVE-2026-1556 · 6.9 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Information disclosure via file URI overwrite in File (Field) Paths
item.description: Information disclosure in the file URI processing of File (Field) Paths in Drupal File (Field) Paths 7.x prior to 7.1.3 on Drupal 7.x allows authenticated users to disclose other users’ private files via filename‑collision uploads. This can cause hoo…

item.title: CVE-2026-4393 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Automated Logout - Moderately critical - Cross-site request forgery - SA-CONTRIB-2026-030
item.description: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in Drupal Automated Logout allows Cross Site Request Forgery.This issue affects Automated Logout: from 0.0.0 before 1.7.0, from 2.0.0 before 2.0.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-4933 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Unpublished Node Permissions - Critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-029
item.description: Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in Drupal Unpublished Node Permissions allows Forceful Browsing.This issue affects Unpublished Node Permissions: from 0.0.0 before 1.7.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-3573 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — AI (Artificial Intelligence) - Moderately critical - Information Disclosure - SA-CONTRIB-2026-028
item.description: Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in Drupal AI (Artificial Intelligence) allows Resource Injection.This issue affects AI (Artificial Intelligence): from 0.0.0 before 1.1.11, from 1.2.0 before 1.2.12.

item.title: CVE-2026-3532 · 4.2 MEDIUM — OpenID Connect / OAuth client - Less critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-027
item.description: Improper Handling of Case Sensitivity vulnerability in Drupal OpenID Connect / OAuth client allows Privilege Escalation.This issue affects OpenID Connect / OAuth client: from 0.0.0 before 1.5.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-3531 · 6.5 MEDIUM — OpenID Connect / OAuth client - Moderately critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-026
item.description: Authentication Bypass Using an Alternate Path or Channel vulnerability in Drupal OpenID Connect / OAuth client allows Authentication Bypass.This issue affects OpenID Connect / OAuth client: from 0.0.0 before 1.5.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-3530 · 4.3 MEDIUM — OpenID Connect / OAuth client - Moderately critical - Server-side request forgery, Information disclosure - SA-CONTRIB-2026-025
item.description: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in Drupal OpenID Connect / OAuth client allows Server Side Request Forgery.This issue affects OpenID Connect / OAuth client: from 0.0.0 before 1.5.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-3529 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Google Analytics GA4 - Moderately critical - Cross-site Scripting - SA-CONTRIB-2026-024
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal Google Analytics GA4 allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS).This issue affects Google Analytics GA4: from 0.0.0 before 1.1.14.

item.title: CVE-2026-3528 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Calculation Fields - Moderately critical - Cross-site Scripting - SA-CONTRIB-2026-023
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal Calculation Fields allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS).This issue affects Calculation Fields: from 0.0.0 before 1.0.4.

item.title: CVE-2026-3527 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — AJAX Dashboard - Critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-022
item.description: Missing Authentication for Critical Function vulnerability in Drupal AJAX Dashboard allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels.This issue affects AJAX Dashboard: from 0.0.0 before 3.1.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-3526 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — File Access Fix (deprecated) - Moderately critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-021
item.description: Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in Drupal File Access Fix (deprecated) allows Forceful Browsing.This issue affects File Access Fix (deprecated): from 0.0.0 before 1.2.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-3525 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — File Access Fix (deprecated) - Moderately critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-020
item.description: Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in Drupal File Access Fix (deprecated) allows Forceful Browsing.This issue affects File Access Fix (deprecated): from 0.0.0 before 1.2.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-3218 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Responsive Favicons - Moderately critical - Cross-site scripting - SA-CONTRIB-2026-019
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal Responsive Favicons allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS).This issue affects Responsive Favicons: from 0.0.0 before 2.0.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-3217 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — SAML SSO - Service Provider - Critical - Cross-site scripting - SA-CONTRIB-2026-018
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal SAML SSO - Service Provider allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS).This issue affects SAML SSO - Service Provider: from 0.0.0 before 3.1.3.

item.title: CVE-2026-3216 · 5 MEDIUM — Drupal Canvas - Moderately critical - Server-side request forgery, Information disclosure - SA-CONTRIB-2026-017
item.description: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in Drupal Drupal Canvas allows Server Side Request Forgery.This issue affects Drupal Canvas: from 0.0.0 before 1.1.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-3215 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Islandora - Moderately critical - Arbitrary file upload, Cross-site scripting - SA-CONTRIB-2026-016
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal Islandora allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS).This issue affects Islandora: from 0.0.0 before 2.17.5.

item.title: CVE-2026-3214 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — CAPTCHA - Moderately critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-015
item.description: Authentication Bypass Using an Alternate Path or Channel vulnerability in Drupal CAPTCHA allows Functionality Bypass.This issue affects CAPTCHA: from 0.0.0 before 1.17.0, from 2.0.0 before 2.0.10.

item.title: CVE-2026-3213 · 4.7 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Anti-Spam by CleanTalk - Moderately critical - Cross-site scripting - SA-CONTRIB-2026-014
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal Anti-Spam by CleanTalk allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS).This issue affects Anti-Spam by CleanTalk: from 0.0.0 before 9.7.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-3212 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Tagify - Moderately critical - Cross-site scripting - SA-CONTRIB-2026-013
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal Tagify allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS).This issue affects Tagify: from 0.0.0 before 1.2.49.

item.title: CVE-2026-3211 · 4.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Theme Negotiation by Rules - Moderately critical - Cross-site request forgery - SA-CONTRIB-2026-012
item.description: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in Drupal Theme Negotiation by Rules allows Cross Site Request Forgery.This issue affects Theme Negotiation by Rules: from 0.0.0 before 1.2.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-3210 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Material Icons - Moderately critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-011
item.description: Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in Drupal Material Icons allows Forceful Browsing.This issue affects Material Icons: from 0.0.0 before 2.0.4.

item.title: CVE-2026-2349 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — UI Icons - Critical - Cross-site Scripting - SA-CONTRIB-2026-010
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal UI Icons allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS).This issue affects UI Icons: from 0.0.0 before 1.0.1, from 1.1.0 before 1.1.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-2348 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Quick Edit - Moderately critical - Cross-site Scripting - SA-CONTRIB-2026-009
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal Quick Edit allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS).This issue affects Quick Edit: from 0.0.0 before 1.0.5, from 2.0.0 before 2.0.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-1917 · 4.3 MEDIUM — Login Disable - Less critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-008
item.description: Authentication Bypass Using an Alternate Path or Channel vulnerability in Drupal Login Disable allows Functionality Bypass.This issue affects Login Disable: from 0.0.0 before 2.1.3.

item.title: CVE-2026-1554 · 4.2 MEDIUM — Central Authentication System (CAS) Server - Less critical - XML Element Injection - SA-CONTRIB-2026-007
item.description: XML Injection (aka Blind XPath Injection) vulnerability in Drupal Central Authentication System (CAS) Server allows Privilege Escalation.This issue affects Central Authentication System (CAS) Server: from 0.0.0 before 2.0.3, from 2.1.0 before 2.1.2.

item.title: CVE-2026-1553 · 4.8 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Drupal Canvas - Moderately critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-006
item.description: Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in Drupal Drupal Canvas allows Forceful Browsing.This issue affects Drupal Canvas: from 0.0.0 before 1.0.4.

item.title: CVE-2026-0948 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Microsoft Entra ID SSO Login - Critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-005
item.description: Authentication Bypass Using an Alternate Path or Channel vulnerability in Drupal Microsoft Entra ID SSO Login allows Privilege Escalation.This issue affects Microsoft Entra ID SSO Login: from 0.0.0 before 1.0.4.

item.title: CVE-2026-0947 · 4.8 MEDIUM — AT Internet Piano Analytics - Moderately critical - Cross-site Scripting - SA-CONTRIB-2026-004
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal AT Internet Piano Analytics allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS).This issue affects AT Internet Piano Analytics: from 0.0.0 before 1.0.1, from 2…

item.title: CVE-2026-0946 · 6.1 MEDIUM 🌩️ — AT Internet SmartTag - Moderately critical - Cross-site Scripting - SA-CONTRIB-2026-003
item.description: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ("Cross-site Scripting") vulnerability in Drupal AT Internet SmartTag allows Cross-Site Scripting (XSS).This issue affects AT Internet SmartTag: from 0.0.0 before 1.0.1.

item.title: CVE-2026-0945 · 5.4 MEDIUM — Role Delegation - Moderately critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-002
item.description: Privilege Defined With Unsafe Actions vulnerability in Drupal Role Delegation allows Privilege Escalation.This issue affects Role Delegation: from 1.3.0 before 1.5.0.

item.title: CVE-2026-0944 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Group invite - Moderately critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2026-001
item.description: Improper Check for Unusual or Exceptional Conditions vulnerability in Drupal Group invite allows Forceful Browsing.This issue affects Group invite: from 0.0.0 before 2.3.9, from 3.0.0 before 3.0.4, from 4.0.0 before 4.0.4.

item.title: CVE-2025-14840 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — HTTP Client Manager - Less critical - Information disclosure - SA-CONTRIB-2025-126
item.description: Improper Check for Unusual or Exceptional Conditions vulnerability in Drupal HTTP Client Manager allows Forceful Browsing.This issue affects HTTP Client Manager: from 0.0.0 before 9.3.13, from 10.0.0 before 10.0.2, from 11.0.0 before 11.0.1.

item.title: CVE-2025-14472 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️ — Acquia Content Hub - Moderately critical - Cross-Site Request Forgery - SA-CONTRIB-2025-125
item.description: Cross-Site Request Forgery (CSRF) vulnerability in Drupal Acquia Content Hub allows Cross Site Request Forgery.This issue affects Acquia Content Hub: from 0.0.0 before 3.6.4, from 3.7.0 before 3.7.3.

item.title: CVE-2025-13986 · 4.2 MEDIUM — Disable Login Page - Critical - Access bypass - SA-CONTRIB-2025-124
item.description: Authentication Bypass Using an Alternate Path or Channel vulnerability in Drupal Disable Login Page allows Functionality Bypass.This issue affects Disable Login Page: from 0.0.0 before 1.1.3.

item.title: CVE-2025-13985 · 5.3 MEDIUM 🌩️ — Entity Share - Moderately critical - Access bypass, Information Disclosure - SA-CONTRIB-2025-123
item.description: Incorrect Authorization vulnerability in Drupal Entity Share allows Forceful Browsing.This issue affects Entity Share: from 0.0.0 before 3.13.0.
